description_long: This is a rectangular, upright postbox with a robust, industrial design, predominantly painted in a deep red color. The front face features a large, flat door with a circular window at its center, allowing a partial view of the interior, and two horizontal ventilation slits above and below the window. The door is secured with a visible hinge on the right edge and likely opens outward for mail retrieval. The left side of the front door displays white printed text, possibly indicating manufacturer or service information. The sides and top are plain, with a consistent red finish and no additional features or openings. The overall construction suggests a metal body, designed for durability and security in public urban environments.
description: A sturdy, red rectangular postbox with a front door featuring a circular window and ventilation slits. The sides are plain, and the door is marked with white text.
description_view_0: A plain, flat red side panel with no visible features or openings.
description_view_1: A narrow edge view showing the depth of the postbox, with a uniform red finish.
description_view_2: The front face with a large rectangular door, circular window, ventilation slits, and white printed text on the left.
description_view_3: The opposite narrow edge, similar to view 1, showing a plain red surface.
attribute_mail_slot_location: centered on the front face above the circular window
attribute_door_or_access_panel: large rectangular door occupying most of the front face
attribute_posting_aperture_design: horizontal rectangular slot with beveled edges
